data.title: As a developer, preplanning orchestrates ui-designer agent with review loop and cache handling
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Refactor preplanning SKILL.md Step 6 to dispatch the dso:ui-designer agent via Agent tool instead of invoking /dso:design-wireframe via Skill tool. Preplanning becomes the orchestrator for: (a) dispatching ui-designer per UI story, (b) handling CACHE_MISSING by running /dso:ui-discover and re-dispatching, (c) running review-protocol on design artifacts, (d) looping with feedback until review passes (max 3 cycles) or escalating to user, (e) acting on scope-split proposals from the agent.
**Why**: Moving orchestration responsibilities from design-wireframe to preplanning eliminates 3+ level Skill nesting while keeping the design pipeline functionally equivalent.
**Scope**:
- IN: Preplanning Step 6 rewrite; Agent tool dispatch of dso:ui-designer; CACHE_MISSING handling (run ui-discover, re-dispatch); orchestrator-managed review loop (review-protocol inline, max 3 cycles); scope-split proposal handling; session file lifecycle updates
- OUT: Changes to the ui-designer agent definition (sibling story); changes to design-wireframe skill file (sibling story); changes to sprint SKILL.md

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, preplanning dispatches dso:ui-designer via Agent tool instead of invoking /dso:design-wireframe via Skill tool, eliminating the 3-level nesting chain
  ← Satisfies: "The sprint → preplanning → design-wireframe nesting chain (3 levels) is eliminated"
- When this story is complete, preplanning runs /dso:ui-discover at orchestrator level when the agent returns CACHE_MISSING, then re-dispatches the agent
  ← Satisfies: "The design-wireframe → ui-discover nesting chain is eliminated; ui-discover runs at orchestrator level"
- When this story is complete, design review runs as an orchestrator-managed loop in preplanning with max 3 revision cycles before user escalation
  ← Satisfies: "Design review is orchestrator-managed: preplanning runs review-protocol on design artifacts and loops with feedback"
- When this story is complete, preplanning acts on scope-split proposals from the agent's return payload
  ← Satisfies: "Preplanning decides whether to act on scope-split proposals"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Orchestrator review loop must handle sub-agent timeout/failure gracefully
- [Reliability] Context window growth — review loop loads design artifacts + feedback each cycle
- [Maintainability] Sequential execution with sibling stories essential
